nasb.text: Then Saul took three thousand chosen men from all Israel and went to seek David and his men in front of the Rocks of the Wild Goats.

esv.text: Then Saul took three thousand chosen men out of all Israel and went to seek David and his men in front of the Wildgoats’ Rocks.

cnv.text: 掃羅就從以色列人中選出三千精兵，帶領他們到野羊磐石去搜索大衛和跟隨他的人。

ccb.text: 就率领三千以色列精兵去野羊岩附近搜索大卫和他的部下。
